title: Hara Modded SMP Pack
description: The main modpack for Hara Rae Sol's Discords modded SMP
body:
## The one-click load and join modpack for Hara Rae Sol's modded Minecraft server!

While the mod count is on the moderate end, most of that is optimization meant to make the experience the most enjoyable for all users, with the intent to fully utilize and enjoy all of the packs' central mods to any extreme you wish!

### Mods the likes of:
Fabrics port of Create (and various addons expanding on trains, decor, automation and even some structures to explore!)

Immersive Aircrafts to explore the various biomes and existing biome changes from the likes of Terralith and Tectonic, or the sights of the airbound dimension Paradise Lost introduces. (In addition to the many structure generation mods included for the joys of exploring!)

Arsenal, Amarite, Simply Swords and a couple more, adding new weapons with unique abilities and enchantments! 
Farmers Delight, along with addons for it to add diversity to the foods and crops of your worlds!

With the likes of Simple Hats, you can add some extra flair to your looks and "vibe" while you enjoy single-player or interact with our recently ongoing server!

Pair your cosmetics with our several decorative mods, such as Rechiseled, Brick Variety or Thaumon to make your base really look like your own!

Along with some other minor highlight mods (in a much less performative list) such as: Gliders, Via Romana, Alloy Forgery, Botany Pots, Chest Cavity, Lootr, Iron Chests, Lunar, Musket Mod, Omni Hoppers, "Open Parties and Claims", Replay, Recall Potions, Storage Drawers, Xaeros Minimap, and Plasmos Voice! Just to show some of the minor mod diversity to think about!

### Additional Info:
If you want to check out the streamer who put me (Beck, The Modpack maker) to task with this pack, check out [Hara Rae Sols Carrd Here](https://hararaesol.carrd.co/)! _(And maybe you might even catch one of her streams of the server)_

_(In the gallery, we've even included a sneak peek into the spawn of the ongoing server~)_

_Additional Footnote: if you're running into trouble running/loading the pack (as some of the testers had), please try running it with Java 21 via the packs settings_
